name_cn:
Top-tier factory, complete packaging
Three-compartment Moss Green!!️
Classic Lady Dior Calfskin, a must-have three-compartment mini bag 😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence 💃🏻, it is also very feminine when carried crossbody or by hand. A classic fashion style. A beautiful bag that many fashion icons and Instagram users own—don't miss out ❤️
size: 17cm
